title: Admissions Open for 2026–27 — UG & PG Programmes
detail: Applications are invited for all UG and PG programmes for the academic year 2026–27. Limited seats available. Apply through our online form or visit the college office.

title: Apr–May 2026 Semester Exam Results Released
detail: Results for April–May 2026 semester examinations are now available on the TVU COE portal. Students can check results at coe.tvu.edu.in

title: Fee Structure 2026–27 Updated
detail: The revised fee structure for the academic year 2026–27 has been updated. Check the Admissions section for details on tuition fees, lab fees and special fees.

title: Previous Year Question Papers Uploaded
detail: Previous year question papers for all UG and PG programmes (2019–2025) have been uploaded in the Examinations section. Students can view and download semester-wise papers.

title: Campus Placement Drive — Registrations Open
detail: TCS, CTS, HCL and Infosys are visiting the campus for placements. Final-year students must register at the Placement Cell before July 15, 2026.

title: New Gallery Added — Virtual Campus Tour
detail: Explore our campus through the newly updated photo gallery featuring classrooms, labs, library, sports facilities and cultural events.

title: Merit-Based Scholarship Applications Open
detail: Students scoring 1000+ in HSC (+2) are eligible for up to 15% tuition fee concession. Applications to be submitted at the college office by July 31.

title: Tamil Nadu Government Scholarship — Special Schemes
detail: Students belonging to SC/ST/BC/MBC categories can avail state government scholarship schemes. Required documents to be submitted to the scholarship cell.

title: TVU Examination Timetable — Nov/Dec 2026 Published
detail: Thiruvalluvar University has published the timetable for November/December 2026 end-semester examinations. Check the TVU website for details.

title: Anti-Ragging Cell — Helpline Active
detail: The college Anti-Ragging Cell is active 24/7. Any ragging incident can be reported to the helpline number or directly to the Principal.
